description: Systematic trading signal generation platform for FX strategies. Runs mean-reversion (Ornstein-Uhlenbeck), momentum, carry-trade, and cross-asset signals on a configurable schedule. Supports signal composition, filtering, and portfolio-level aggregation. For AUD/USD, the engine maintains dedicated signal pipelines including: (1) OU mean-reversion with 30-day half-life calibration, (2) carry signal based on AU-US OIS differential, (3) commodity-beta momentum using iron-ore 20-day returns, and (4) risk-sentiment signal derived from VIX and credit spreads. Signals are published to downstream execution and portfolio engines via Azure Service Bus with sub-100ms latency.
endpoints:
GET /api/v2/signals/{ccyPair} — current signal values and metadata
GET /api/v2/signals/{ccyPair}/history — historical signal time series
POST /api/v2/signals/backtest — run signal backtest over historical period
GET /api/v2/signals/composite — aggregated multi-signal view
POST /api/v2/signals/config — update signal parameters
